objective: Visibility bug-finding refactor: expose JSON connection-import candidate ordering/entry-default assumptions in the parser, with focused regression for stale top-level defaults hiding entry overrides.
completedSlices: Added regression proving an entry token must override an importable top-level token default when entries are present.
Extracted _entryCandidateMaps and changed _jsonCandidateMaps to treat entries as primary candidates, falling back to decoded top-level only when no entry maps exist.
nextCandidates: Inspect _bestImportFromCandidateMaps tie-breaking for equal-score entry candidates; add provenance/order characterization only if product semantics require first-vs-last deterministic preference.
validationReceipts: dart --enable-asserts lib/features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: stale top-level token won)
